slides.prompt: Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Very dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Top: bold red #E63946 stripe full width + COMPACT white text '열성경련 긴급 가이드'. Top-right below stripe: 소아과언니 white Pretendard SemiBold small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Headline COMPACT 25% smaller: '경련이 일어났을 때' white bold, '3단계 행동법' bright red #E63946. Small white subtitle: '6개월~5세 소아 대상 · NINDS 가이드라인 기준'. LARGE prominent line illustration of child having seizure with parent nearby, white outline on dark background, clean medical style. Bottom-left small gray: 'PARENTING NOTE · 003'. No pixel values as text on card. No quotes on card.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Top-left small mint rounded label: '열성경련이란?'. Headline COMPACT 25% smaller: '생후 6개월~5세' white, '발열과 함께 경련' mint #2EC4B6. Center: LARGE clean line illustration of child with fever thermometer icon, white and mint outline on dark background. Below illustration: dark card #1A2B3C rounded GENEROUS padding, white text 'AAP 가이드라인에 따르면 대부분 1~2분 이내에 저절로 멈춥니다'. Bottom thin mint divider. No pixel values as text on card. No quotes on card.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Top-left mint rounded label: '1단계 ✓'. Headline COMPACT 25% smaller: '안전한 곳에' white, '눕히기' mint #2EC4B6. Mint outlined box GENEROUS padding around content. Row 1: SMALL line icon of child lying down left with mint ✓ overlay + COMPACT white text right '아이를 안전한 곳에 눕히세요', GENEROUS spacing. Row 2: SMALL icon of clearing objects left with mint ✓ overlay + COMPACT white text right '주변 위험물을 치우세요'. Row 3: SMALL icon of hands crossed out left with mint ✓ overlay + COMPACT white text right '경련 중 아이를 붙잡거나 억제하지 마세요'. Bottom thin mint divider. No pixel values as text on card. No quotes on card.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Top-left mint rounded label: '2단계 ✓'. Headline COMPACT 25% smaller: '옆으로 눕혀' white, '기도 유지' mint #2EC4B6. Center: LARGE clean line illustration of child lying on side with airway arrow indicator, white and mint outline on dark background, medical diagram style. Below: mint outlined box GENEROUS padding, Row 1: SMALL icon of side position left with mint ✓ + COMPACT white text right '아이를 옆으로 눕혀 기도를 유지하세요'. Row 2: SMALL icon of open airway left with mint ✓ + COMPACT white text right '구토물을 삼키지 않고 기도를 열어둘 수 있습니다'. Bottom thin mint divider. No pixel values as text on card. No quotes on card.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Top-left mint rounded label: '3단계 ✓'. Headline COMPACT 25% smaller: '시간 재고' white, '관찰하기' mint #2EC4B6. Center: LARGE line illustration of stopwatch showing 5 minutes with observation eye icon, white and mint outline on dark background. Mint outlined box GENEROUS padding. Row 1: SMALL stopwatch icon left with mint ✓ + COMPACT white text right '시간을 재고 경련 양상을 관찰하세요'. Row 2: SMALL phone icon with 119 left with red emphasis + COMPACT white text right '경련이 5분 이상 지속되면 119에 전화하세요' slightly larger. Bottom thin mint divider. No pixel values as text on card. No quotes on card.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Top-left red rounded label: '절대 하지 마세요 ❌'. Headline COMPACT 25% smaller: '입에 아무것도' white, '넣지 마세요' red #E63946. Red outlined box GENEROUS padding around content. Row 1: SMALL line icon of spoon/object crossed out left with red ❌ overlay + COMPACT white text right '경련 중에 입에 아무것도 넣지 마세요', GENEROUS spacing. Row 2: SMALL icon of blocked airway left with red ❌ overlay + COMPACT white text right '입에 물건을 넣으면 기도가 막히고'. Row 3: SMALL icon of breathing difficulty left with red ❌ overlay + COMPACT white text right '호흡이 어려워질 수 있습니다'. Bottom thin red divider. No pixel values as text on card. No quotes on card.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Top-left red rounded label: '절대 하지 마세요 ❌'. Headline COMPACT 25% smaller: '해열제나 물' white, '먹이지 마세요' red #E63946. Red outlined box GENEROUS padding. Row 1: SMALL icon of medicine bottle crossed out left with red ❌ overlay + COMPACT white text right '경련 중에는 해열제나 물을 먹이지 마세요', GENEROUS spacing. Row 2: SMALL icon of wet towel crossed out left with red ❌ overlay + COMPACT white text right '미온수로 닦지 마세요'. Row 3: SMALL icon of cold water crossed out left with red ❌ overlay + COMPACT white text right '찬물에 넣어 체온을 낮추려고 하지 마세요'. Bottom thin red divider. No pixel values as text on card. No quotes on card.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Full-width bright red #E63946 header bar top + white bold '경련 후 반드시 진료'. Center: LARGE line illustration of ambulance and hospital building, white outline on dark background. Below: Large red rounded border box GENEROUS padding. Number 1 red circle + white text '경련이 멈춘 후 소아과 진료를 받아 발열 원인을 확인하세요', GENEROUS spacing. Number 2 red circle + white text '처음 열성경련이 있었다면 반드시 의료진 평가가 필요합니다'. Bottom small gray text: 'AAP · NINDS 권장'. No pixel values as text on card. No quotes on card.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy #0D1B2A. VERY GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Top-center small gray: 'SAVE & SHARE'. Headline COMPACT 25% smaller: '오늘 확인하고' white, '저장하세요' mint #2EC4B6 with thin mint underline. Source box dark #1A2B3C rounded GENEROUS padding: 출처 white small bold, bullet NINDS Febrile Seizures Fact Sheet 2026, bullet AAP HealthyChildren.org 2024, bullet NHS inform Scotland 2026, bullet Children's Hospital of Philadelphia 2025. Thin white horizontal divider. 소아과언니 white bold large center NO quotes NO decoration. Small gray: DR.SOA UNNIE · 소아청소년과 전문의. Thin white divider. @dr.soa_unnie · 매주 새 가이드 white. 소아과수첩 앱 · 야간 달빛병원 바로 찾기 mint #2EC4B6. No pixel values as text on card. No quotes anywhere on card.

common_style:
# 경고·긴급 톤 — 검증된 prompt 패턴

## 공통 규칙 (전 슬라이드)
- 배경: 짙은 네이비 #0D1B2A
- 텍스트: 흰색 #FFFFFF
- 긴급 강조: bright red #E63946
- 안전/긍정: mint #2EC4B6
- 카드 배경: #1A2B3C
- GENEROUS outer margin 모든 슬라이드
- 텍스트 크기 25% 작게
- 슬라이드마다 아이콘/일러스트 필수
- 시그니쳐: 우상단 소아과언니 white (따옴표 없이 4글자만)

## COVER 패턴 (slide n:1)
Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Very dark navy background #0D1B2A.
GENEROUS outer margin all sides.
Top: bold red #E63946 stripe full width + COMPACT white text '[토픽] 긴급 가이드'.
Top-right below stripe: '소아과언니' white Pretendard SemiBold small, no quotes.
Headline COMPACT (25% smaller): '[첫 줄]' white bold, '[핵심 긴급 표현]' bright red #E63946.
Small white subtitle: '[부제] · AAP 가이드라인 기준'.
LARGE prominent line illustration [토픽 관련 응급 장면] white outline on dark background.
Bottom-left small gray: 'PARENTING NOTE · [번호]'.
No pixel values. No quotes.

## 금지 항목 패턴 (❌ 슬라이드)
Dark navy background.
Top-left red rounded label: '절대 하지 마세요 ❌'.
Headline COMPACT: '[내용]' white, '[핵심]' red.
Rows stacked: SMALL LINE ILLUSTRATION ICON left (red ❌ overlay) + COMPACT white text right.
Red outlined box around all rows, comfortable padding.
No pixel values.

## 행동 항목 패턴 (✓ 슬라이드)
Dark navy background.
Top-left mint rounded label: '[행동] ✓'.
Headline COMPACT: '[내용]' white, '[핵심]' mint #2EC4B6.
Rows stacked: SMALL ICON left (mint ✓ overlay) + COMPACT white text right, GENEROUS spacing.
Mint outlined box around all rows.
No pixel values.

## 119 패턴
Full-width bright red header bar + white bold '[긴급 행동]'.
LARGE relevant illustration center (구급차/응급 아이콘).
Numbered items: red number + white text, GENEROUS spacing.
Large red rounded border around items.

## OUTRO 패턴 (slide n:9)
Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy #0D1B2A.
VERY GENEROUS outer margin.
Top-right: '소아과언니' white small, no quotes.
Top-center small gray: 'SAVE & SHARE'.
Headline COMPACT: '오늘 확인하고 저장하세요' white, '저장하세요' mint underline.
Source box dark #1A2B3C rounded GENEROUS padding.
출처 (white small bold)
· [출처 1]
· [출처 2]
Thin white divider.
소아과언니 white bold large center (NO quotes).
DR.SOA UNNIE · 소아청소년과 전문의 gray.
Thin divider.
@dr.soa_unnie · 매주 새 가이드 white.
소아과수첩 앱 · [CTA] mint.
No pixel values. No quotes.
